compiled_state.description:
# BUG: config-file mcp.readonly not honored by the LLM runner's comment tool

## What
`runner.py:566-571` `_readonly_gate` reads only env `REBAR_MCP_READONLY`; `mcp_server.py:208-223` is config-aware. A server made read-only via `[mcp] readonly=true` (env unset) hides MCP write tools but a `source=local` gate run still grants the review agent `comment_ticket` (`runner.py:219`, `pai_tools.py`).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Both surfaces resolve read-only through one config-aware helper (env wins over file, fail-closed).
- [ ] Regression test: file-only readonly => the review agent's comment tool is withheld.
- [ ] Commit carries a `rebar-ticket:` trailer.
compiled_state.title: BUG: config-file mcp.readonly not honored by the LLM runner's comment tool
